gaps: No test case validates the DFU success screen content (what name/title is displayed) after a firmware update completes — all existing tests focus on pre-update UI (buttons, release notes, badges, popups) or language-change DFU flows, not post-update success screen verification.

No test case covers the specific scenario of updating ONLY the Charge Stand (while headset firmware is already up to date) — existing tests either update all components or focus on language-change DFU flows.
No test case validates that the correct component name (e.g., 'Charge Stand' vs. 'Headset') is displayed on the DFU success screen, which is the core failure point of this bug.

🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION MISSING: No test validates what happens to the success screen display when the app is backgrounded/foregrounded during or after the DFU completes — could the name change or reset on app lifecycle events.

🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY MISSING: No test differentiates between device types (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ with Charge Case vs. a headset with Charge Stand) in the success screen content — the bug may manifest differently across product lines.

🧠 STATE TRIGGER MISSING: No test validates exactly WHEN the success screen name is populated (e.g., is it read from the DFU response payload, from the device's advertised name, or from a cached value) — this is critical to understanding why the wrong name appears.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-001: Verify DFU success screen displays correct component name when updating only Charge Stand
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify headset firmware is already up to date (no update available).
Verify Charge Stand firmware update is available.
Tap 'Update' on the Charge Stand firmware card (do NOT update headset).
Wait for the DFU process to complete (download → transfer → install).
Observe the DFU success/completion screen that appears after installation finishes.
Note the component name/title displayed on the success screen (e.g., 'Charge Stand updated successfully' or similar).
generated_testcases.expected: The DFU success screen displays the correct component name: 'Charge Stand' (or 'Charge Case' depending on product naming). The name 'Headset' or the headset's Bluetooth name (e.g., 'Poly Voyager Free 60+') is NOT shown in place of the Charge Stand name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-002: Verify DFU success screen displays correct component name when updating only Headset
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify Charge Stand firmware is already up to date (no update available).
Verify headset firmware update is available.
Tap 'Update' on the Headset firmware card (do NOT update Charge Stand).
Wait for the DFU process to complete.
Observe the DFU success/completion screen.
Note the component name/title displayed on the success screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The DFU success screen displays the correct component name: 'Headset' (or 'Earbuds' depending on product naming). The name 'Charge Stand' is NOT shown in place of the headset name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-003: Verify DFU success screen name persistence after app background/foreground post-update
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify Charge Stand firmware update is available and headset is up to date.
Tap 'Update' on the Charge Stand firmware card only.
Wait for DFU to complete and the success screen to appear.
Note the component name displayed on the success screen.
Press the Home button to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher (not cold start).
Observe the DFU success screen content.
generated_testcases.expected: After backgrounding and foregrounding the app, the DFU success screen still displays the correct component name ('Charge Stand'). The name does not change, reset, or become blank due to the app lifecycle event.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-004: Verify DFU success screen name persistence after app force-kill and relaunch post-update
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify Charge Stand firmware update is available and headset is up to date.
Tap 'Update' on the Charge Stand firmware card only.
Wait for DFU to complete and the success screen to appear.
Note the component name displayed on the success screen.
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps).
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app (cold start).
Observe the screen that appears after reconnection (success screen may or may not reappear).
If a success screen reappears, note the component name displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: If the DFU success screen reappears after force-kill and relaunch, it displays the correct component name ('Charge Stand'). If the success screen is not shown again (expected behavior for cold start), the app should navigate to the Device screen showing the Charge Stand firmware version correctly updated — no incorrect naming is displayed anywhere.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-005: Verify DFU success screen name after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect during DFU completion
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify Charge Stand firmware update is available and headset is up to date.
Tap 'Update' on the Charge Stand firmware card only.
When DFU reaches ~90% completion, trigger a Bluetooth disconnection (e.g., turn off Bluetooth on phone or move out of range).
Wait for DFU to complete (device-side installation may still finish).
Re-enable Bluetooth and allow the device to reconnect.
Observe the screen that appears after reconnection.
If a DFU success screen is shown, note the component name displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: After Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect, if a DFU success screen is displayed, it shows the correct component name ('Charge Stand'). The name is not replaced by the headset's Bluetooth name or any cached/generic name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-006: Verify DFU success screen name when updating Charge Stand on Voyager Free 60+ (Touchscreen Case) vs. other product lines
steps: Connect a Voyager Free 60+ UC device to Poly Studio Mobile.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify Charge Stand (Touchscreen Case) firmware update is available and headset is up to date.
Tap 'Update' on the Charge Stand firmware card only.
Wait for DFU to complete.
Observe the success screen and note the component name displayed.
Repeat steps 1-6 with a different product line that has a Charge Stand (e.g., a headset with a desk Charge Stand like Voyager Focus 2).
Compare the component names displayed on both success screens.
generated_testcases.expected: For Voyager Free 60+ UC, the success screen displays 'Charge Case' or 'Touchscreen Case' (the correct product-specific name). For other product lines with a Charge Stand, the success screen displays 'Charge Stand' or the appropriate component name. Neither screen incorrectly displays the headset's name in place of the charging component name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-007: Verify DFU success screen name source — change device Bluetooth name before update
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Device Info or General Settings.
Change the device Bluetooth name to 'My Test Headset' (or a custom name).
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify Charge Stand firmware update is available and headset is up to date.
Tap 'Update' on the Charge Stand firmware card only.
Wait for DFU to complete.
Observe the DFU success screen and note the component name displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: The DFU success screen displays the correct component name ('Charge Stand' or 'Charge Case'), NOT the custom Bluetooth name ('My Test Headset'). This confirms the success screen name is sourced from the component identifier in the DFU response payload, not from the device's advertised Bluetooth name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-SUCCESS-008: Verify DFU success screen name when both headset and Charge Stand are updated simultaneously
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager Free 60+ UC.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software.
Verify both Headset and Charge Stand firmware updates are available.
Tap 'Update All' or update both components (if individual selection is required, select both).
Wait for the DFU process to complete for both components.
Observe the DFU success/completion screen.
Note the component name(s) displayed on the success screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The DFU success screen correctly identifies both updated components (e.g., 'Headset and Charge Case updated successfully' or shows two separate success messages). Neither component name is replaced by the other, and the headset's Bluetooth name is not shown in place of either component name.
